top_signals.title: Crypto Biz: How stablecoins found their niche
top_signals.summary: Stablecoins are carving out specialized roles as regulation reshapes the market, while Strategy’s Bitcoin sale and Vanguard’s tokenization push highlight crypto’s evolving financial landscape.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: How the U.S.-Iran deal set the stage for renewed fighting over the Strait of Hormuz
top_signals.summary: The U.S. and Iran's contradictory interperations of the memorandum of understanding have led to renewed fighting over the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Delta Travel Demand Withstands Fuel Costs
top_signals.summary: Delta’s earnings beat and it reaffirmed its full-year profit guidance as travel demand withstands higher prices. Sheila Kahyaoglu, Senior Equity Research Analyst at Jefferies, discusses the outlook for the airline industry. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Meta's stock heads for best week since early 2024 as optimism builds around AI strategy
top_signals.summary: Meta released two AI models this week as part of its new Muse Spark family, under the leadership of Alexandr Wang.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Hackers exploit critical auth bypass in Gitea Docker image
top_signals.summary: Hackers are actively exploiting a critical vulnerability in the official Docker image for the Gitea self-hosted Git service that allows attackers to impersonate any user, including administrators. [...]
